segments.text: Today I want to show you a Premiere plugin that uses AI to cut your footage.
I've been using it for about a week and the workflow is unbelievable.
We're going to walk through the timeline and see the AI plugin in action.
It picks up keywords, jumps on the beat, and removes the boring bits.
Honestly it's the kind of tool I wish I had two years ago.
If you want to try it, the link is below. Thanks for watching.
